name: risk-gated-narrative-alpha
description: Turns CMC-style market, narrative, and portfolio-risk signals into buy, hold, or avoid decisions with hard risk gates.

market.description: CMC-style market metrics, including optional dataAgeMinutes freshness context.

narrative.description: News, social, KOL, and catalyst signals.

risk.description: Portfolio drawdown, data freshness, and execution risk limits.

externalApis: CoinMarketCap Agent Hub compatible input adapter

reviewExamples.name: Deterministic demo response
reviewExamples.purpose: Shows the exact JSON payload a downstream agent can consume.

reviewExamples.name: Live-style CMC Agent Hub payload
reviewExamples.purpose: Shows the enriched CMC-compatible adapter input shape.

reviewExamples.name: Baseline comparison report
reviewExamples.purpose: Compares risk-gated decisions against a naive buy-all baseline.
